# AWS Vision Financial — https://awsvision.com

> Licensed financial services and investment management firm offering savings accounts, fixed deposits (FD), and wealth management with monthly profit distribution. U.S. headquarters in Lewes, Delaware and Germantown, Maryland.

## Primary services
- High yield savings accounts with monthly gratuity tiers
- Fixed deposit (FD) and certificate of deposit accounts
- Wealth management and investment plans (Silver through Executive tiers)
- Non-profit organization investment program
- Online banking and client investment portal

## Key pages
- Home: https://awsvision.com/
- Open account: https://awsvision.com/signup
- Wealth management: https://awsvision.com/wealth-management
- Fixed deposits: https://awsvision.com/personal/cds
- Savings: https://awsvision.com/personal/savings
- Rates: https://awsvision.com/rates
- Compare vs banks: https://awsvision.com/compare
- FAQ: https://awsvision.com/faq
- Contact: https://awsvision.com/contact
